prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约6350名、7109名、12975名、10917名、11784名。2021-2022年位次稳定在6000-7000名区间，2023年因小语种专业热度下降大幅后移至约12975名，2024年回升至约10917名，2025年再次小幅后移至约11784名。近三年位次在10900-13000名之间波动，整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准位次约11784名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年40人、2022年42人、2023年41人、2024年41人、2025年37人、2026年（招生计划文件）30人。2025年已较前几年缩减，2026年进一步缩招至30人，较2025年减少约18.9%，缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京外国语大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第79-82名左右（2026年约第79名），属于全国知名外语类顶尖院校，在语言类高校中具有标杆地位；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及考研名师田静学历造假相关舆情（标注北京外国语大学毕业信息后删除），对学校形象有一定影响；抖音热度为较热（总排名第39位），短视频平台仍保持一定关注度；2023年曾出现小语种专业录取位次明显下降的投档异常信号，反映出外语类专业整体热度有所降温；外国语言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是学校核心优势。招生专业中英语、德语、法语、西班牙语、俄语、日语等均属外国语言文学一级学科，学科实力全国领先；法学、新闻传播学、汉语言文学等专业虽非该校A类学科，但依托学校平台也有较好发展。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业2024年社会热度为"一般观望"，整体热度平稳偏冷；法学为"分化观望"；新闻传播为"明显劝退"。浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年的约29万人大幅增加约37.5%，竞争显著加剧；北京外国语大学位于北京市，非浙江省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；浙江省作为经济发达省份，考生对外语类、国际关系类专业仍有一定需求，但近年来工科、计算机类专业的报考热度更高，对外语类院校形成一定分流压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2026年招生计划大幅缩招（30人 vs 2025年37人）使竞争有所缓和，但浙江省考生总数从约29万激增至约40万（+37.5%），竞争压力显著加大，是推动位次上移的最关键因素；学校声誉偏负面、外语类专业热度一般等因素对报考热度有轻微抑制。在，考虑考生总数大幅增加带来的竞争加剧效应，向上修正约350名。预测2026年最低录取位次约10797名，区间10297-11297名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约10797名，区间10297-11297名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业（联合培养项目、英语、法学等）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（阿拉伯语、工商管理类、计算机等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如10297名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（11297名附近）应以三档专业为主、二档为辅。计算机科学与技术（数智技术）虽属三档但社会热度偏热，报考时需注意竞争可能高于预期。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province comprehensive category were approximately 6350, 7109, 12975, 10917, and 11784 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 6000-7000 range from 2021 to 2022, dropped significantly to about 12975 in 2023 due to decreased popularity of minor language majors, rebounded to about 10917 in 2024, and slightly shifted back to about 11784 in 2025. In the past three years, rankings fluctuated between 10900 and 13000, showing an overall backward trend, with a baseline ranking of about 11784 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province comprehensive category: 40 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 37 in 2025, and 30 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents). 2025 has already decreased compared to previous years, and 2026 further reduces enrollment to 30, a decrease of about 18.9% from 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking around 79-82 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (about 79th in 2026). It is a nationally renowned top foreign language institution, holding a benchmark position among language universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the academic fraud scandal of postgraduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing (who claimed Beijing Foreign Studies University graduation but later deleted it), which has some impact on the university's image. On Douyin (TikTok), its popularity is relatively high (ranked 39th overall), maintaining some attention on short video platforms. In 2023, there was a significant drop in admission rankings for minor language majors, indicating a cooling trend in foreign language majors overall. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), the core strength of the university. Majors such as English, German, French, Spanish, Russian, and Japanese all fall under the first-level discipline of Foreign Language and Literature, with leading national strength. Majors like Law, Journalism and Communication, and Chinese Language and Literature, though not A-class disciplines, also have good development relying on the university's platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors is 'generally wait-and-see', with overall stable but slightly cool popularity; Law is 'differentiated wait-and-see'; Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged'. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% from about 290,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Zhejiang Province, so there is no provincial admission preference. As an economically developed province, Zhejiang still has some demand for foreign language and international relations majors, but in recent years, engineering and computer science majors have higher application popularity, creating some diversion pressure on foreign language institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (30 vs 37 in 2025) eases competition somewhat, but the surge in Zhejiang Province examinees from about 290,000 to about 400,000 (+37.5%) greatly increases competitive pressure, which is the most critical factor pushing rankings upward. The slightly negative reputation and generally cool popularity of foreign language majors have a mild suppressing effect on application enthusiasm. Taking into account the intensified competition from the large increase in examinees, an upward adjustment of about 350 places is made. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 10797, with a range of 10297-11297.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10797, range 10297-11297. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (joint training programs, English, Law, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Arabic, Business Administration, Computer Science, etc.) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 10297), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; for rankings near the upper bound (around 11297), prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary. Although Computer Science and Technology (Digital Intelligence Technology) is in Tier 3, its social popularity is relatively high, so competition may be higher than expected when applying.
